text: March mentor check-in: how is everyone's calving season going so far?
Thirty head on the home section. Two close including one expecting twins. Storm coming mid-week.
Reminder - if anyone needs emergency vet during the storm call the clinic direct. We have coverage Thursday.
Feed deliveries may be delayed Wednesday-Thursday due to the blizzard warning. Plan accordingly.
Blizzard warning issued for Browning area March 23-24. Everyone prep your shelters and check hay supply.
Barn holds about eight. Priority to first-calvers. Rest get the windbreak and extra bales.
Vaccines current on everyone's herds? Good time to check before the storm traps you.
Cattlemen's Workshop wrap-up: good turnout this year. Thanks to all mentors who participated.
Good to see the young ranchers engaged. Happy to host again next season.
Hay prices update: $8.50/bale for good timothy mix. Let me know if anyone needs a bulk order before the storm.
